commands.review_summary:
This PR updates MiniMax token-plan fetching/parsing, menu rendering, subscription/points metadata, API-token fallback behavior, automatic metric selection, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main's MiniMax remains parser requires positive count totals, so the reported percent-based zero-count token-plan response is source-reproducible; I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human maintainer review is needed for MiniMax live endpoint order and credentialed metadata behavior; there is no narrow remaining automated code repair after the boosted-quota fix.
